title: The Straw Hats Recover in Secret
description: On pages 23, 24, 25, this part focuses on alabasta learns the truth. The kingdom begins sorting through what happened, while the Straw Hats remain hidden and the World Government moves to control the official story.
scene: This scene belongs to the Alabasta Learns the Truth sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, King Cobra, Smoker, Tashigi.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That I don't want her to die!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: My crew won't stop fighting either!

summary: The kingdom begins sorting through what happened, while the Straw Hats remain hidden and the World Government moves to control the official story.
